ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "sort_key" TEXT /* Sort key for the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the class */,
  "namespace_id" TEXT /* Namespace identifier for the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "steward" TEXT /* Steward of the class */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the class */,
  "minimum_cardinality" REAL /* Minimum cardinality of the class */,
  "maximum_cardinality" REAL /* Maximum cardinality of the class */,
  "minimum_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the class */,
  "maximum_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the class */,
  "minimum_characters" INTEGER /* Minimum number of characters in the class */,
  "maximum_characters" INTEGER /* Maximum number of characters in the class */,
  "unit_of_measure_type" TEXT /* Unit of measure type for the class */,
  "specified_unit_id" TEXT /* Specified unit ID for the class */,
  "attribute_concept" TEXT /* Attribute concept of the class */,
  "conceptual_domain" TEXT /* Conceptual domain of the class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the class (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_unit_of_measure_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_of_measure_type") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_steward FOREIGN KEY ("steward") REFERENCES stewards ("steward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_attribute_concept FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_concept") REFERENCES attribute_concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES value_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_conceptual_domain FOREIGN KEY ("conceptual_domain") REFERENCES conceptual_domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "sort_key" TEXT /* Sort key for the attribute */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class to which the attribute belongs */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the attribute */,
  "namespace_id" TEXT /* Namespace identifier for the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "steward" TEXT /* Steward of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute */,
  "minimum_cardinality" REAL /* Minimum cardinality of the attribute */,
  "maximum_cardinality" REAL /* Maximum cardinality of the attribute */,
  "minimum_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the attribute */,
  "maximum_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the attribute */,
  "minimum_characters" INTEGER /* Minimum number of characters in the attribute */,
  "maximum_characters" INTEGER /* Maximum number of characters in the attribute */,
  "unit_of_measure_type" TEXT /* Unit of measure type for the attribute */,
  "specified_unit_id" TEXT /* Specified unit ID for the attribute */,
  "attribute_concept" TEXT /* Attribute concept of the attribute */,
  "conceptual_domain" TEXT /* Conceptual domain of the attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attribute (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the attribute (e.g., regular expression, range) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES value_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_attribute_concept FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_concept") REFERENCES attribute_concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_steward FOREIGN KEY ("steward") REFERENCES stewards ("steward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_conceptual_domain FOREIGN KEY ("conceptual_domain") REFERENCES conceptual_domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_unit_of_measure_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_of_measure_type") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "namespaces" (
  "namespace_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the namespace */,
  "namespace_name" TEXT /* Name of the namespace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the namespace */,
  "description_url" TEXT /* URL pointing to a detailed description of the namespace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stewards" (
  "steward_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the steward */,
  "steward_name" TEXT /* Name of the steward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the steward */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the steward */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the steward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("steward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_types" (
  "data_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardinalities" (
  "cardinality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cardinality */,
  "minimum_cardinality" REAL /* Minimum cardinality value */,
  "maximum_cardinality" REAL /* Maximum cardinality value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cardinality */,
  "description_url" TEXT /* URL pointing to a detailed description of the cardinality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardinality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measure" (
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the unit of measure */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit of measure */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measure */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit of measure */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit of measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_concepts" (
  "concept_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concept */,
  "description_url" TEXT /* URL pointing to a detailed description of the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conceptual_domains" (
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the conceptual domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the conceptual domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conceptual domain */,
  "description_url" TEXT /* URL pointing to a detailed description of the conceptual domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data value */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date value of the attribute */,
  "value_numeric" REAL /* Numeric value of the attribute */,
  "value_string" TEXT /* String value of the attribute */,
  "value_unit_id" TEXT /* Unit ID for the value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data value was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data value was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_value_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_unit_id") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data value being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data value */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data value was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("value_id")
)
